headline: Ingersoll Rand Acquires Fox s.r.l., Expanding Metering and Dosing Capabilities
summary: DAVIDSON, N.C., May 04, 2026--Ingersoll Rand Inc., (NYSE: IR) a global provider of mission-critical flow creation and life science and industrial solutions, has acquired Fox s.r.l. and XF s.r.l. ("Fox"), expanding the company’s metering and dosing technologies portfolio.

raw.headline: Ingersoll Rand Acquires Fox s.r.l., Expanding Metering and Dosing Capabilities
